mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_report ( userId, beginTime, interviewField, interviewPosition, interviewPositionKeyword, interviewScore, totalInterviewTime ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{beginTime}, #{interviewField}, #{interviewPosition}, #{interviewPositionKeyword}, #{interviewScore}, #{totalInterviewTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, userId, beginTime, interviewField, interviewPosition, interviewPositionKeyword, interviewScore, totalInterviewTime FROM interview_report WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, userId AS userId, beginTime AS beginTime, interviewField AS interviewField, interviewPosition AS interviewPosition, interviewPositionKeyword AS interviewPositionKeyword, interviewScore AS interviewScore, totalInterviewTime AS totalInterviewTime FROM interview_report WHERE userId = #{userId} LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
